fields.description: Frappe Page slug (directory name under page/). Example: panel-page-mirrored
fields.label: Page Slug

fields.description: Title shown in the Frappe desk page bar for this route.
fields.label: Page Title

fields.description: Title on the teal header bar above the root WP Tables panel (panelLabel in the Vue SPA).
fields.label: Panel Header Text

fields.description: Value for doctype_source on the root WP Tables filter and Panel Action scope (Mirror or Native).
fields.label: DocType Source Mode

fields.description: Target slug for switch_page(...) Panel Actions that navigate to this SPA. Usually the same as Page Slug.
fields.label: Switch Handler Slug
